{{Quote|We are Taat. But we were Chiss once, and we understand how dangerous it is to underestimate them.|ReyaTaat|<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King" />}}
'''Daer'ey'ath''',<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref> known by her [[Core name/Legends|core name]] '''Reya''',<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King" /> was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Intelligence officer/Legends|intelligence officer]]<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War" /> of the [[Chiss Intelligence]].<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King" /> By [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Reya had [[Joiner|joined]] and become the [[Prime (title)|Prime]] of the [[Taat]] [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] nest, from this point on she became known as '''ReyaTaat'''. Reya claimed she was found bordering on starvation when the Taat took her into their nest and made her a voluntary Joiner.<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King" /> At some point, [[the Colony]] learned of the [[Battle of Bogo Rai]] from ReyaTaat.<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War" />
